name: Crema Catalana
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine milk, lemon peel, orange peel, and cinnamon sticks in a heavy medium saucepan.
2. Bring to boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove from heat and discard the lemon peels, orange peels, and cinnamon sticks.
5. Using an electric mixer, beat egg yolks and sugar in a large bowl until light and lemon-colored.
6. Beat in cornstarch.
7. Gradually whisk in hot milk. Return mixture to saucepan.
8. Cook over medium heat until the mixture boils, whisking constantly, about 10 minutes.
9. Divide custard into six 2/3 cup custard cups.
10. Refrigerate at least 3 hours or overnight.
11. Preheat broiler.
12. Sprinkle brown sugar evenly over custards and broil until brown sugar caramelizes (or caramelize with a round branding iron).
13. Serve.
Yield: 6 servings
